revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:安房神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Awa Shrine''' * {{ill|Awa Shrine|en|Awa Shrine|qid=Q705547|lt=Awa Shrine (Chiba)|1=Awa Shrine}} - A shrine located in Tateyama City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Awa Shrine (Oyama)|ja|安房神社 (小山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awa Shrine (Oyama)|1=Awa Shrine (Oyama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q59282622}} - A shrine located in Oyama City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Awakuchi Shrine|ja|安房口神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awakuchi Shrine|1=Awaguchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q59282598}} - A shrine located in Yokosuka City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Awa Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|阿波神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awa Shrine (Tokushima)|1=Awa Shrine (Tokushima)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11657564}} - A shrine located in Naruto City, Tokushima Prefecture. * Awa Tenmangū - A sub-shrine located in {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū Shrine (Kyoto)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman-gū Shrine (Kyoto)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|若宮八幡宮社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}}, in Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. {{Disambiguation|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|安房神社 (曖昧さ回避)|version=74604054|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:安房神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
<!--Awa Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Awa Shrine (disambiguation)--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q79727319}} [[Category:Shinto shrines with the same name]]
